acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Rate-limited Review lookup waits and retries only the lookup
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Bounded provider cooldown regression passes without a real sleep.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Completed reviewer session is not started again
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Coordinator preserves reviewer result, workspace, run and attempt.
300 tests, 100% coverage, zero Credo issues and zero Dialyzer errors.

summary: Review-stage cooldown recovery is bounded, durable and validated on the exact branch HEAD.
